title: Avail Financial Services Limited – Penalty Order for Governance and Concentration Violations
description: <cite index="25-6,25-7,25-8,25-9">RBI imposed a penalty of ₹6.20 lakh on Avail Financial Services Limited through an order dated July 10, 2026 for violating RBI's governance and credit/investment concentration norms, with the company's Managing Director serving as a director in two other Middle Layer NBFCs and exceeding the regulatory limit for exposure to a single party.</cite>
